intro: Mirror selected Microsoft Teams channels into this project (data/teams/) so the agent can observe and analyze team communication. Reading channels requires a connected MS365 account that is a member of the observed teams.
notConnected: Microsoft 365 is not connected for this project. Connect with an account that is a member of the teams you want to observe (delegated scopes: Team.ReadBasic.All, Channel.ReadBasic.All, ChannelMessage.Read.All).
popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Allow popups for this site.
syncNowHint: Run one sync cycle over all observed channels now
noChannels: No channels observed yet — pick a team and channel below.
noTeams: No joined teams found for the connected account.
scopesHint: If loading teams fails with a permissions error, re-connect MS365 — the Teams scopes were added later and require re-consent (ChannelMessage.Read.All needs tenant-admin consent).
